https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/serv.text_sample: Human-Centered Care Services - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Services Our Consulting Services If you are interested in care integration, human-centered care, empathic communication, trauma informed care, Motivational Interviewing, decreasing stigma and bias, supporting your employees in a meaningful way, developing high quality virtual or digital care, we can help! The Lay Counselor Academy We provide intensive, high quality learning, development and support for your staff to be confident, competent counselors for your patients, clients or students. Find Out More Supporting Employee Mental Health We know your employees need care too, and that the EAP just doesn’t cut it. We provide incredible, high quality, rapid and direct access to mental health services for your employees, including individual counseling, and support groups. headings: Learn Essential Mental Health Counseling Skills!
Listen to Co-Creators Elizabeth Morrison & Ali Moreno share their story and the mission behind The Lay Counselor Academy
Invest in your team's growth and your organization's mental health capacity
https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/serv.text_sample: The Lay Counselor Academy - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Learn Essential Mental Health Counseling Skills! Empower your team to provide empathic, evidence-based mental healthcare. Transform care delivery and meet the growing behavioral health needs of the community you serve. What is a Lay Counselor? Lay counselors are trained professionals who provide crucial mental health support without traditional clinical licenses. They offer empathic care, bridging the gap in mental health services. Learn more What is The Lay Counselor Academy? The Lay Counselor Academy is a course that equips your staff with practical mental health counseling skills. See the options we offer below. 01 The LCA: Live Our flagship course! 14 weeks of live, practice-based learning. You will go through the course with a cohort of amazing people, just like yourself. There are 5 personal counseling sessions included in this option! Contact us to register. 02 The LCA: Self-Paced Our new, fully a

headings: Empathic, Affordable Mental Health Counseling for You. Just text 209-800-7922 to get started!
Want to know more about flourish?
Why Mental Health Matters At Work
https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/serv.text_sample: Employee Mental Health Support - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Flourish Counseling Services Empathic, Affordable Mental Health Counseling for You. Just text 209-800-7922 to get started! This is counseling, the way it should be: compassionate, non-judgmental support for you, as you navigate life’s challenges. Not sure? Text us for a free 30-minute counseling session, to try us out! Learn More Our Flourish Counselors We also contract with organizations to provide employees easy access to high quality mental healthcare! Workers who felt supported with their mental health overall were 26% less likely to report at least one symptom of a mental health condition in the past year. Mental Health in the Workplace Report 2021 Mind Share Partners Imagine telling your employees they have easy, fast access to high-quality mental health support. With Flourish, employees can text a dedicated number, and ask to be connected to a counselor. They will get a response within hours,

https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/abou.title: About EM Consulting – Empathic Healthcare for All
headings: Listen to Co-Creators Elizabeth Morrison & Ali Moreno share their story and the mission behind The Lay Counselor Academy
https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/abou.text_sample: About EM Consulting – Empathic Healthcare for All Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat About Us Transforming Mental Healthcare, Together We believe mental healthcare should be accessible, empathic, and rooted in the community. The problem is clear. We have an overwhelming surge in mental health needs coupled with a critical shortage of licensed clinicians. This gap makes it increasingly challenging to access care for the patients or clients who rely on us. With the Lay Counselor Academy , we’ve created a scalable, human-centered approach to mental healthcare – one therapeutic conversation at a time. Our Mission We envision a future where everyone seeking culturally responsive mental health support can find it quickly and locally, provided by compassionate counselors who listen deeply, understand fully, and respond with genuine empathy. Connect With Us Meet the Co-Creators The Lay Counselor Academy is the vision of two dedicated leaders committed to reshaping the mental healthcare landscape: Elizab

https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com/cook.text_sample: Cookie Policy (UK) - Elizabeth Morrison Consulting Skip to content Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Home About The Team Services The Lay Counselor Academy Flourish Counseling Services Resources Blog Let's chat Cookie Policy (UK) Cookie Policy (UK) This Cookie Policy was last updated on December 19, 2025 and applies to citizens and legal permanent residents of the United Kingdom. 1. Introduction Our website, https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com (hereinafter: "the website") uses cookies and other related technologies (for convenience all technologies are referred to as "cookies"). Cookies are also placed by third parties we have engaged. In the document below we inform you about the use of cookies on our website. 2. What are cookies? A cookie is a small simple file that is sent along with pages of this website and stored by your browser on the hard drive of your computer or another device. The information stored therein may be returned to our servers or to the servers of the relevant third parties during a subsequent visit. 3. What are scripts? A script is a piece of program code that is used to make our website functio
